name: example

git.lastCommit: 10dd270 docs: document testing & security; mark Stage 4 complete

openThreads: Building the /memory command (init | status | save | resume).
Deciding which memory artifacts to version vs keep gitignored.
nextSteps: Run /memory init to seed a real working memory.
Verify the close/reopen checkpoint: reopen a fresh session and /memory resume.
Update README + CLAUDE.md and commit Stage 5.
decisions: One /memory command dispatching on $ARGUMENTS over four modes.
Each memory is context/memories/<name>/ with session.json + memory.md + handoff.md.
context/memories/ stays gitignored; only context/memories/example/ is committed.
